proof_boundary: Opportunity rows are signals and research prompts only, not recommendations, demand proof, margin proof, or buyer validation.

confidence.confidence_reason: Local packet and source references can seed research, but no buyer, demand, margin, route, or qualified-review evidence is attached.

signals.next_step: create or continue readiness packet; collect real buyer, demand, source, and logistics evidence.

source_provenance.claim_boundary: Packet source is orientation only; it does not prove demand, supplier fit, tariff, compliance, or shipment readiness.
source_provenance.name: official_reference
